Extended Functionality:
It contains functions for matrix transformations (e.g., translate, rotate, scale), quaternions, data packing, random number generation, and noise functions.

Standardized Conventions:
The extensions are designed to align with standard OpenGL fixed-function conventions, such as those for projection matrices (lookAt, perspective).

Modular Inclusion:
Users can include only the specific extensions they need (e.g., #include <glm/ext/matrix_transform.hpp>) to keep compile times efficient.
